title: Saving Accounts with No Growth/Zero Withdrawal Requirements (or with Work around)
body:
Use the provided tables & info as guide. Make up your own mind what to use & always check the bank provided Term & Conditions (and fine print).
Note 1: ING, BOQ, MEB, AMP require bonus interest criteria to be met in the previous month. This allows taking money out in the current month without loss of interest.
Note 2: The account flip/swap method, allows taking money out any time (keeping balance to the minimum growth required, e.g. $50 for St George) without loss of interest.
